title: Variances
summary: 9609 AS — favourable and adverse variances, analysis, and corrective action.

simpleExplanation.title: Actual vs plan
simpleExplanation.summary: A variance is the difference between budgeted and actual figures. Investigating variances helps managers control performance.
steps: Favourable: costs lower or revenue higher.

sections.content: **Variances** (5.5.2) completes **AS Topic 5 Finance**. Always state **F or A** and **possible cause** from the case.
